narration: At the root, we swap the left and right children.
callout: The local job is always the same: swap left and right.

narration: After the root swap, the top children become 7 on the left and 2 on the right.
decision: Then the same swap happens inside both subtrees.

narration: Swapping left and right at every node makes a mirror version of the whole tree.
callout: Many small swaps create one big mirror.
